title: Project ADN (VR Modpack)
body:
# Prepare for Signus.

### This modpack is no longer.

Welcome to Project ADN!
This is a modpack that is meant to be played in Virtual Reality this means that every aspect from the original game (or almost) has been changed to make minecraft feel like a completely different and new VR game!

This modpack features Over 500+ New Structures, 240+ New biomes, 120+ New Mobs, New game progression system, and much more!

if you download this modpack and have no idea how some things work or want to learn more about the mods in this modpack you can still join the discord server, all of the guides i did are still there sooo yeah, glhf!
